ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "drone_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the drone belongs to */,
  "calibration_status" INTEGER /* Calibration status of the drone (True/False) */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the drone (mAh) */,
  "max_flight_time" REAL /* Maximum flight time of the drone (minutes) */,
  "max_payload" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity of the drone (kg) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the drone (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drones_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator managing the fleet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the fleet */,
  "fleet_description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleets_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "geofence_coordinates" TEXT /* Geofence coordinates defining the zone boundaries */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of zone (e.g., urban, rural, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone conducting the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the flight occurred */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission associated with the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, in progress, aborted) */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., delivery, inspection, monitoring) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., delivery, inspection, monitoring) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the mission (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration (e.g., initial, routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., drone, flight, mission) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., flight, drone, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the weather data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (°C) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (m/s) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction (°) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the GPS data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the GPS record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude (°) */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude (°) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude (m) */,
  "gps_signal_strength" REAL /* GPS signal strength (dB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obstacle_data" (
  "obstacle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obstacle record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the obstacle data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the obstacle record */,
  "obstacle_type" TEXT /* Type of obstacle (e.g., tree, building, person) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the obstacle (m) */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing to the obstacle (°) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obstacle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obstacle_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
